# ForgeFlow Documentation Templates

These templates standardize lifecycle-document structure without deciding a
milestone's requirements, architecture, or scope. Instantiate only the template
whose lifecycle condition is met in `docs/process/document-governance.md`.

- `milestone/` contains milestone entry, canonical plan, progress, phase
  completion record, and retrospective templates.
- `ai-assisted/` contains the non-authoritative Superpowers implementation
  draft template.

Replace every `<PLACEHOLDER>` when creating an instance. Do not copy a template
into a milestone merely because it exists.
